title: 第1節　朝霧橋の風
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bridge incident paired with scene-001-002-002-sera.
Keep the same cherry-blossom riverside approach, urban bridge, and cool spring wind mood in both images.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第2話　川風に乗る. Scene focus: 第1節　朝霧橋の風 / サトーパート. Summary: 住宅街を抜け、白鷺川の河川敷へ下りた瞬間、桜吹雪が視界の高さで横へ流れた。遊歩道の上を薄桃色の筋が走り、川面はまだ朝の白さを残している。こういう景色は見に行くものというより、走… Key beats: 住宅街を抜け、白鷺川の河川敷へ下りた瞬間、桜吹雪が視界の高さで横へ流れた。遊歩道の上を薄桃色の筋が走り、川面はまだ朝の白さを残している。こういう景色は見に行くものというより、走っているうちに向こうから来てくれるくらいがちょうどいい。サトーは口元を少しゆるめ、そのまま自然に歩幅を整えた。 最初の数百メートルは抑えめに入る。ジャケットの前をわずかに開け、呼吸が浅くなりすぎない速度を探る。左に川、右に草の斜面、その向こうにマンションの列。都内の風景なのに、走っているあいだだけは妙に余白がある。白い花びらがシューズの先へまとわりついては離れ、また風にさらわれていった。 そのまま朝霧橋へ上がるスロープへ入ると、風は河川敷より一段だけ冷たくなった。けれど不快ではない。火照りはじめた頬へ当たると、むしろちょうどいい。欄干の向こうには、朝日を受けた川が長く伸びていた。 橋の踊り場の先で、自転車がわずかによろけ、作業ベスト姿の男が慌てて床へしゃがみこむのが見えた。橋の上は横風が抜けるし、朝露も残りやすいのだろう。見晴らしがいい場所ほど、足元の管理は面倒そうだとサトーは勝手に納得した。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bridge incident paired with scene-001-002-002-sera. Keep the same cherry-blossom riverside approach, urban bridge, and cool spring wind mood in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Show Sato dominant running from a cherry-blossom-lined embankment onto an urban river bridge, with visible spring petals, morning light, and a strong sense of fresh air. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near stairs, bridge shadows, or far along the path, never companion-like.
